title: Mobile capture problem (post-Evernote)
body_markdown:
## Mobile capture problem (post-Evernote)

The unsolved piece of any local-first knowledge system. Everything
else — search, organize, render, synthesize — has a good answer.
Capture on a phone, from anywhere, in under five seconds, doesn't.

Current fallback: keep Evernote running purely as a capture inbox;
Pipeline 01 picks up new notes on its schedule.
